title: Sky Corps
content:

The '''Sky Corps''' was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Corps/Legends|corps]] serving in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. At one point during the war, five of the Sky Corps' [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] flew in a [[Cloud/Legends|clouded]] location.<ref name="Insider 84" />

The Sky Corps served within one of the Grand [[Army/Legends|Army's]] twenty [[Sector Army/Legends|Sector Armies]], and was comprised of 36,864 clone troopers subdivided into four [[Legion/Legends|legions]],<ref name="GGAR Corps" /> including at least five<ref name="Insider 84" /> [[Clone paratrooper/Legends|clone sky troopers]].<ref name="Sky trooper" /> It was [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] by a [[Clone Marshal Commander/Legends|Clone Marshal Commander]] and a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]].<ref name="GGAR Commanding Officers" /> The Sky Corps' sky troopers wore standard [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase II clone trooper armor]] and wielded the [[DC-15S/Legends|DC-15S]] [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbine]]. They were equipped with a [[winged jet backpack]] that was emblazoned with two [[Republic crest/Legends|Galactic Roundels]].<ref name="Insider 84" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Sky Corps was first mentioned in "[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]," an eight-page reference article written by [[Karen Traviss]] and [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]] for the [[Star Wars Insider 84|84th issue]] of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'',<ref name="Insider 84" /> published by [[IDG Entertainment]] on [[September 26]], [[2005]].<ref name="InsiderDate">{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20050913.html|text=The Ultimate Clone Guide in ''Star Wars Insider'' #84}}</ref> The Sky Corps' depiction in the article was illustrated by [[Chris Trevas]].<ref name="Insider 84" />
